checks.title: World Cup fixture count
checks.runbook: If this fails, stop publishing consumers and rebuild fixtures from the canonical platform fixture source.

checks.title: World Cup coverage row count
checks.detail: Coverage should have one row per fixture; found 104.
checks.runbook: Run scripts/build_world_cup_coverage.py after model/public datasets are published.

checks.title: Published prediction count
checks.detail: Published predictions should cover all fixtures; found 104.
checks.runbook: Ask the predictor project to regenerate predictions and write them to platform inbox, then run scripts/publish_predictor_inbox.py.

checks.title: Full rebuild automation readiness
checks.detail: Default World Cup publish pipeline must be self-contained and runnable in GitHub Actions.
checks.runbook: Run scripts/build_automation_readiness_report.py and remove any default pipeline dependency on sibling repositories.

checks.title: World Cup runtime odds snapshots
checks.detail: World Cup odds snapshots currently contain 0 rows.
checks.runbook: Only enable a soccer-capable paid or approved odds provider. TheOddsAPI free key is not soccer-capable.

checks.title: World Cup lineup availability
checks.detail: Confirmed lineup rows are expected only inside the pre-match lineup window.
checks.runbook: If inside T-90/T-60/T-30 and still unavailable, check API-FOOTBALL plan coverage or official FIFA match centre fallback.

checks.title: World Cup injury source status
checks.detail: Injury source status is missing_auth. Placeholder rows are not proof of no injuries.

evidence.runtime_status_reason: API_FOOTBALL_KEY is not configured in environment or local .env file.

checks.runbook: Use official/FIFA/news manual evidence for critical absences until a provider plan with World Cup coverage is approved.

checks.title: World Cup weather forecast coverage
checks.detail: Weather rows before forecast windows should be explicit placeholders, not missing data.
checks.runbook: When matches enter the forecast window, run scripts/collect_world_cup_runtime_data.py with weather provider keys or Open-Meteo fallback.

checks.title: World Cup prematch context rows
checks.detail: Prematch context should publish one row per fixture; found 104.
checks.runbook: Run scripts/collect_world_cup_runtime_data.py and scripts/build_world_cup_model_runtime_datasets.py; inspect source freshness in source-health.json.
